overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character traversing mountainous wilderness during a dark, stormy night. The character runs through varying terrain from grassy valley floors to rocky outcrops under an overcast sky with dramatic low lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy mountain valley floor with scattered conifers

agents.ego_description: character running steadily through grassy valley terrain toward distant tree line

entered.detail: grassy terrain with patches of dirt forming a natural valley floor
sparse pine and spruce trees dotting the hillside
dark silhouette of mountain range against stormy sky
dark heavy cloud cover with subtle lightning illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, stormy night in a grassy mountain valley. The character runs forward through the valley floor, surrounded by scattered coniferous trees and distant mountain ridges visible against the storm clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested hillside with mixed grass and rocky outcrops

events.description: character begins ascending steeper grassy slope with increased incline

agents.ego_description: character running uphill through grass and trees, navigating the incline toward higher ground

entered.detail: large dark rock formation emerging from the grassy slope
thick grouping of pine trees blocking portions of the sky

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grassy hillside, transitioning from the open valley into a more forested area with dense conifer clusters. Rocky outcrops appear on the left as the terrain steepens, and the sky becomes partially obscured by the tree canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass with boulders and valley vista

events.description: terrain shifts from grassy hillside to rocky mountain path with large boulders

agents.ego_description: character carefully navigating down rocky slope between boulders toward valley with distant lights

entered.detail: massive rock formations and boulders scattered across the path
expansive view of lower valley with distant lights visible in the darkness
steep incline covered in loose rocks and gravel

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions to a rocky mountain pass with large boulders and loose gravel underfoot. The character descends toward a valley vista where distant lights twinkle in the darkness below. Vegetation becomes sparse as the rocky landscape dominates the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy mountain wilderness that shifts from an open grassy valley to a rugged, rocky pass. It begins with the character running across a dark valley floor dotted with coniferous trees under a heavy, clouded sky. As the character ascends a steep hillside, the open terrain transitions into dense clusters of conifers and rocky outcrops that partially obscure the storm above. The scene then shifts as the vegetation thins, moving the character onto a rocky mountain pass filled with large boulders and loose gravel. Finally, the camera descends from the heights toward a wide valley vista where distant lights twinkle in the darkness below.
